name: OUI-Spy
label: OUI-Spy Unified Blue (colonelpanichacks)
description: MAC OUI vendor-identification scanner — fingerprints nearby WiFi/BLE devices by manufacturer (OUI) prefix. Built via PlatformIO; releases ship merged .bin images for the ESP32-S3 (LILYGO T-Display S3 / XIAO ESP32-S3). Formal releases may 404, which the flash core tolerates (source-only fallback).
note: Aligned with flash_core OuiSpyProfile (colonelpanichacks/oui-spy-unified-blue — the combined/flashable build). The meta repo colonelpanichacks/oui-spy has no formal releases. All release .bin assets map to esp32s3 (fixed); merged image flashed at 0x0.
